headline: Delta Cancels Some Midwest Flights as Winter Storm Approaches
summary: Delta Air Lines is cancelling some flights from Midwest airports ahead of a winter storm that’s expected to bring blizzard conditions and high winds this weekend. The carrier says it is rebooking customers scheduled to fly through 26 affected airports, including its Minneapolis-St.

headline: Credit-card cash reshapes US airline loyalty — and profit
summary: By Rajesh Kumar Singh CHICAGO, March 13 (Reuters) - For years, the fortunes of U.S. airlines have been dictated by fares, fuel bills and how many passengers fill their cabins.

headline: Cuba’s president confirms talks with U.S. — but warns an agreement will take time
summary: It comes at a time when the Caribbean island is grappling with a worsening economic crisis.
